name: Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sales of advanced polymer materials in China and internationally. The company offers laminating film materials, including graphic products, cultural and creative design, image design, printing and packaging, eco laminating materials and laminating equipment, and electronic display products; and prisms, diffusers, cd-free QD films, blue-light transfer films, anti-blue light films, OLED tapes, and vehicle display materials. It also provides hard coating films, protective films, special adhesive tapes, and ITO films; optical insulation film products; carbon fiber decorative films, high performance PDLC films, and other products; materials for flexible displays; capacitive touch screens; and BOPET substrates, self-adhesive protective films, and optical film substrates. In addition, the company develops smart high definition glasses-free 3D display technology. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Kangde Xin Composite Material Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.
